name: @rayspec/conversation-runtime
description: The generic Tier-B conversational-ingress capability (conversation_input) — an idempotent client-keyed conversation create plus a bounded JSON turn submit that persists the user turn in a capability-owned ledger and emits a durable workflow trigger. Product-neutral; a record×file hybrid (record_input donates the JSON-payload discipline, file_input donates the manifest/handler/mount template).
